scripts.render: remotion render src/index.ts HiddenWeek ../../assets/stories/hidden-week-story.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=20 --pixel-format=yuv420p && ffmpeg -y -i ../../assets/stories/hidden-week-story.mp4 -an -c:v copy ../../assets/stories/hidden-week-story.noaudio.mp4 && mv ../../assets/stories/hidden-week-story.noaudio.mp4 ../../assets/stories/hidden-week-story.mp4
scripts.render:metro-hle: remotion render src/index.ts MetroHealthyLifeExpectancy ../../stories/metro-healthy-life-expectancy/assets/metro_healthy_life_expectancy_animation.mp4 --codec=h264 --crf=20 --pixel-format=yuv420p && ffmpeg -y -i ../../stories/metro-healthy-life-expectancy/assets/metro_healthy_life_expectancy_animation.mp4 -an -c:v copy ../../stories/metro-healthy-life-expectancy/assets/metro_healthy_life_expectancy_animation.noaudio.mp4 && mv ../../stories/metro-healthy-life-expectancy/assets/metro_healthy_life_expectancy_animation.noaudio.mp4 ../../stories/metro-healthy-life-expectancy/assets/metro_healthy_life_expectancy_animation.mp4
